description:
Returns the [[localize|unlocalized]] text value of a side or an object's/group's side.

{{{!}} class="wikitable"
! Side
{{!}} [[east]] / [[opfor]]
{{!}} [[west]] / [[blufor]]
{{!}} [[resistance]] / [[independent]]

{{!}} [[sideEnemy]]
{{!}} [[sideFriendly]]

{{!}} [[sideEmpty]]
{{!}} [[sideAmbientLife]]

! Result
{{!}} "East"
{{!}} "West"
{{!}} "Resistance"
{{!}} "Civilian"
{{!}} colspan="6" {{!}} "Unknown"
{{!}}}

name: WFSideText
